title: Stonecutter Likes Wood
description: turn the Stonecutter into a Woodcutter without extra blocks.  Tons of mod integration with extra wood types, and a config file
body:
Stonecutter Likes wood



Stonecutter can now actually cut logs and planks into things like stripped logs, boats, sticks, trapdoors, fences and more!




This GIF shows some crafting with this mods and minimal other mods installed

![wood recipes](https://imgur.com/TIIGt7e.gif)



- For modpack developers, recipe additions are compatible with JSON data packs



- Works with all wood types including bamboo, cherry, mangrove etc, as well as built in recipes for some modded wood types



- Adds one config file to turn on and off groups of recipes with a true/false control.

This a sample version of the file generated in the config folder

This lets you disable large groups of recipes without touching any data packs or JSON files

For example If we set boats false and restart the game it looks like this

and this is with signs false showing those recipes going away









Built-in compatibility





If some other mods with wood are also installed, they will have these configured stonecutter wood recipes as well



- Recipes for Quark's wood types

- Compatible with Quark Posts, Hollow logs and Vertical slabs

- Recipes for Twilightforest wood types

- Compatible with Banisters from Twilightforest

- Recipes for Biomes o Plenty wood types

- Recipes for Aether's skyroot

- Recipes for Thermal's Rubberwood

- Also install mods like Absent by Design for more block variants such as Wooden Walls

- Compatible with JEI and EMI

- Of course if any of the above mods are not found only the vanilla recipes will be available as normal



Examples








This next GIF shows some crafting with this mod and several others as well showing compatibility with blocks from those other mods
![modded wood](https://i.imgur.com/MlmcWZs.gif)
